title: Provenance
description: Lineage attached to every derived artifact and every answer. Enables reproduction, correction propagation, and deletion enumeration.

source_document_id.description: Stable ID of the immutable original.

source_revision.description: Revision/version of the source document this artifact derives from.

source_checksum.description: Checksum of the original object at processing time.

source_coordinates.description: Where in the source this artifact came from. For documents: page, section, bbox, char span. For CAD models: cad_entity_type (solid|face|edge|pmi|property|part), cad_entity_id (kernel handle/persistent id), cad_part_ref (owning part in an assembly), cad_label (feature/property name). Open-ended so new source kinds can add coordinate keys without a schema change.

processing_versions.description: Exact versions of every processing step, so an artifact can be reproduced or invalidated when a step changes.

geometry_kernel.description: CAD B-rep kernel and version used to read geometry (e.g. 'OCCT-7.8.0'). Null for tessellated formats like STL.

tessellation.description: Tessellation engine/parameters that produced the canonical mesh (e.g. 'occt-incremental-mesh:0.1' or 'trimesh:4.12.2').

extraction_tier.description: CAD extraction tier for this artifact: full_geometry | metadata_only | needs_conversion | blocked.
